headline: Piper Sandler Downgrades American International Gr to Neutral, Lowers Price Target to $80
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Paul Newsome   downgrades American International Gr (NYSE:AIG) from Overweight to Neutral and lowers the price target from $88 to $80.
